caption:
Iran laying mines in the Strait of Hormuz could send oil higher, but oil spikes are usually temporary. The bigger opportunity, in my opinion, is the defense tech needed to actually deal with what happens next.

That is why I keep watching Kraken Robotics.

Kraken makes critical underwater technology like synthetic aperture sonar and subsea batteries that help power the next generation of mine hunting and autonomous underwater defense systems. And that is exactly the kind of capability that matters if this situation keeps escalating.

I’ve been long this stock since $3, and I still think the market is underestimating how important Kraken could become in undersea defense.

Comment STOCK below and I’ll send you the ticker, my entire stock portfolio, and my full thesis on Kraken Robotics.
